stateNotes: Local workflow automation scaffold records the current stable workflow state without advancing design-system business state.
Typography CSS visual QA has warnings and does not create promotion readiness.
Future local Agent cycles must read registry/next-action.json before making changes.
Schema version 2 separates activeAction from nextRecommendedAction.
Reverse runtime high-fidelity work and design-system extraction are separate tracks.
SummaryDashboard is the only active object scope until the workflow goal is explicitly expanded.
